items.title: Intro
items.author: ooze
items.content: hey. I’m Ivan, but you can call me ‘Ooze’. 11 years systems engineering. 4 years software dev. before that, distributed free lean to kids. got absolutely folded by the Power Rangers mid-operation and had to reassess my life goals. no regrets. they barely won. looking forward to learning the language and hopefully contributing something to the community!

items.title: Kemal hitting 1000 downloads a day as a new record
items.author: /u/sdogruyol
